determines how the notification is interpreted</div><div>- foreign keys used depend on the notification type</div><div><br></div><div><div>type:</div><div>&nbsp; - follow</div><div>&nbsp; - like</div><div>&nbsp; - repost</div><div>&nbsp; - quote</div><div>&nbsp; - bookmark</div><div>&nbsp; - comment</div><div>&nbsp; - comment_reply</div><div>&nbsp; - comment_like</div><div>&nbsp; - div.div: - user_id: the user who receives the notification
- actor_id: the user who triggered the notification
- type determines how the notification is interpreted
- foreign keys used depend on the notification type
- comment_id: related comment (used for comment-based notifications)
